arts.ttl: England 1-2 Greece: Lee Carsley explains strange tactics in UEFA Nations League defeat
arts.sum: England interim boss Lee Carsley explains his controversial and ultimately unsuccessful tactics in the Three Lions' shock 2-1 loss to Greece in the UEFA Nations League.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley insists he would be 'more than happy' to return to England U21s side after interim spell
arts.sum: Carsley’s tactics came undone in a shock Wembley defeat to Greece

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley knows who is to blame after England's humiliation against Greece
arts.sum: The Three Lions were beaten 2-1 at Wembley on Thursday night after going without Harry Kane - due to injury - or any recognised striker and attempting to fit in all their attack-minded midfielders

arts.ttl: Carsley doesn't expect to receive England job full-time after Greece loss
arts.sum: Lee Carsley is refusing to rule himself out as Gareth Southgate's permanent successor but has admitted he expects to return to the England U21s.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Lee Carsley delivers Bukayo Saka update after England scare
arts.sum: Arsenal winger Bukayo Saka is forced off with a leg injury during England's shock 2-1 defeat to Greece in the UEFA Nations League.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane in scathing attack on England star after Greece loss: 'He's not going to change'
arts.sum: Jordan Pickford was once again under the spotlight for England as the Three Lions were beaten 2-1 by Greece at Wembley in the Nations League on Thursday night

arts.ttl: 'Hopefully I will be going back to U21s' | Does Carsley doubt himself for England job?
arts.sum: Lee Carsley raises questions of self-doubt over being named permanent England manager after stating has just three games left as interim manager.

arts.ttl: England’s failed experiment gives one answer to Lee Carsley - but asks another about him
arts.sum: England 1-2 Greece: Bellingham scored late on to equalise but the Three Lions went on to concede another

arts.ttl: Jordan Pickford proves why Lee Carsley MUST give England's other goalkeepers a chance
arts.sum: ENGLAND 1-2 GREECE: Jordan Pickford had one of his weakest performances in an England shirt on Thursday, as interim boss Lee Carsley tasted defeat for the first time

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley's big decision backfires as England audition turns into humiliation
arts.sum: ENGLAND 1-2 GREECE: Lee Carsley suffered his first defeat as England interim manager at Wembley on Thursday, denting his hopes of getting the role on a permanent basis
